features: Compact, Convenient Length | 1.2m cable keeps your desk or car neat while reaching your devices easily
Clear, Balanced Audio | Standard 3.5mm stereo connectors deliver consistent, high-quality sound for music and calls
Instant Plug & Play | Ready to use immediately with no setup or drivers required
Durable Everyday Design | 3.2mm cable and robust connectors built to last through frequent use
Universal Device Compatibility | Works with phones, tablets, PCs, laptops, car stereos, headphones, and other 3.5mm audio devices
description: From the manufacturer Clear, Balanced Audio Compact, Convenient Length | 1.2m Instant Plug & Play Universal Device Compatibility AV:Link | 3.5mm Stereo Plug to 3.5mm Stereo Plug Audio Lead – Universal Aux Cable for PC, Car, Smartphone, Tablet, Headphones, Portable Audio Devices | Black | 1.2 Metre Connect your devices effortlessly with the AV:LINK 1.2m 3.5mm stereo audio lead. Perfect for smartphones, tablets, laptops, car stereos, or headphones, it delivers clear, balanced sound for music, podcasts, and calls. Its 1.2m length keeps your space tidy while offering enough reach for practical everyday use. Durable, easy to use, and universally compatible, it’s the reliable audio solution for home, office, or on the go. PRODUCT FEATURES: Compact, Convenient Length | 1.2m cable keeps your desk or car neat while reaching your devices easily Clear, Balanced Audio | Standard 3.5mm stereo connectors deliver consistent, high-quality sound for music and calls Instant Plug & Play | Ready to use immediately with no setup or drivers required Durable Everyday Design | 3.2mm cable and robust connectors built to last through frequent use Universal Device Compatibility | Works with phones, tablets, PCs, laptops, car stereos, headphones, and other 3.5mm audio devices BOX CONTAINS: 1 x AV:Link 1.2m 3.5mm stereo audio lead SPECIFICATION: Cable length: 1.2 metres Cable diameter: 3.2mm Core: 10 x 0.10mm Weight: Approx. 40g Connectors: 3.5mm stereo male to male Compatible with: Phones, tablets, PCs, laptops, car stereos, headphones, and other 3.5mm audio devices
